event: Landscape with aqueduct in Nervi, Italy
description: A vibrant landscape depicting an Italian coastal town with colorful buildings in pink, white, and yellow, dominated by a large multi-arched aqueduct or viaduct spanning the middle ground. Mountains rise steeply in the background with green and purple slopes. A smaller bridge is visible in the foreground. The colors are bold and expressive, with thick brushstrokes creating a lively, energetic composition typical of early modernist painting.
